name: Glory (optical phenomenon)

visual_attributes.morphology: concentric rings around the shadow of the observer's head
distinctive_features: red on the outside, bluish towards the center
surrounds the shadow of the observer's head

domain_specific_visual.LIGHT_INTERACTION: wave interference of light internally refracted within small droplets
domain_specific_visual.OBSERVATION_POINT: centered on the antisolar or antilunar point

functional_attributes.primary_function: optical phenomenon caused by light interaction with water droplets

domain_specific_functional.PHYSICAL_PROCESS: wave interference and surface wave interaction

relationships.description: Often seen in association with the Brocken spectre when viewed from a mountain or tall building.
Can occur simultaneously with a rainbow under the right conditions.

symbolic_items: Great Seal of the United States

contextual_attributes.origin: observed globally, notably in China and Europe
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: symbol of personal enlightenment in Chinese culture

contrastive_constraints: NOT a complete ring without interruption
NOT a phenomenon with a large diameter like a rainbow
